# LeetCode Daily

> A mobile learning app for software enthusiasts to practice LeetCode problems daily, tailored to skill level and preferred programming language.

## About

LeetCode Daily is an educational mobile app available on iOS and Android that delivers personalized daily coding challenges. It helps developers build consistent problem-solving habits through curated algorithm and data structure problems.

## Key Features

- **Daily Personalized Problems**: Fresh coding challenges every day, matched to your skill level
- **6 Programming Languages**: Java, Python, C++, JavaScript, C#, Go
- **3 Skill Levels**: Beginner ("I am a Newbie"), Intermediate ("I know a Few Things"), Advanced ("I'm Pretty Good at This")
- **AI Tutor**: Step-by-step AI explanations for any problem — clarify constraints, explore approaches, and understand solutions
- **Streak & Progress Tracking**: Daily streaks, stats, and visual progress
- **Syntax-Highlighted Solutions**: Clean, formatted code solutions in your preferred language
- **Offline Support**: Cached problems available without internet
- **Push Notification Reminders**: Smart daily reminders
- **Pro Plan**: Up to 3 daily problems, full archive, all solution approaches, bookmarks, ad-free

## Links

- Website: https://leetcodedaily.app
- Blog: https://leetcodedaily.app/blog/
- App Store (iOS): https://apps.apple.com/app/id6756704733
- Google Play (Android): https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.screentrace.leetcodedaily
- Privacy Policy: https://leetcodedaily.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://leetcodedaily.app/terms
- Support: support@leetcodedaily.app

## Technical Details

- Built with Flutter (cross-platform)
- Backend: Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions, Cloud Messaging)
- Authentication: Google Sign-In, Apple Sign-In
- Monetization: In-app subscriptions (monthly/yearly Pro plans)

## Pages

- [Home](https://leetcodedaily.app/) — Landing page with app overview and download links

- [Privacy Policy](https://leetcodedaily.app/privacy) — How we handle user data
- [Terms of Service](https://leetcodedaily.app/terms) — Terms for using the app
